title: FY 2024-2025 - 3rd Quarter

City of Oceanside

300 North Coast Highway,
Oceanside, California 92054

Agenda Date: 6/4/2025

DATE:  June 4, 2025
TO:
  Honorable Mayor and City Councilmembers
FROM: Financial Services Department
TITLE: FY 2024-25 THIRD QUARTER FINANCIAL STATUS REPORT
RECOMMENDATION
Staff submits the third quarter Financial Status Report and recommends that the City Council accept
the report and approve the budget adjustments.
BACKGROUND AND ANALYSIS
The City Council adopted the FY 2024-25 budgets on June 5, 2024. The approved General Fund
includes $216.28 million in revenues, with recurring expenditures totaling $215.45 million and an
additional $3.26 million allocated for one-time costs, bringing the total General Fund budget to
$218.71 million. Across all funds,
